details: The agent reported 14 labels but the known fact is approximately 124 labels. The agent's approach of scanning issues and probing known label names was fundamentally inadequate - it only found labels that happened to appear on issues in the pages it sampled, plus a few common GitHub default labels it guessed. The agent correctly noted there was no dedicated list_labels tool, but its workaround was insufficient to discover the full set of ~124 labels. The final count of 14 is drastically wrong compared to the actual ~124 labels.
